exports.name: DuckdbTest
exports.description: DuckDB WASM test component with n6k extension loading and SQL execution.

exports.name: inferType
exports.description: Infers a Vega-Lite type string from an Arrow schema field and its chart role.

exports.name: isExpression
exports.description: Detects whether a string is a SQL expression (vs. a plain column name).

exports.name: resolveDataSource
exports.description: Resolves a table name or query prop into a full SELECT statement.

exports.name: resolveSourceForSQL
exports.description: Resolves a data source into a SQL fragment suitable for use in a FROM clause.

exports.name: buildChartQuery
exports.description: Builds a SELECT query that aliases expression fields for chart consumption.

exports.name: useChartData
exports.description: React hook that resolves a data source, builds a query, and returns chart-ready rows.

exports.name: resolveField
exports.description: Resolves a field name through the field map, falling back to the original name.

exports.name: temporalAxisConfig
exports.description: Determines the appropriate date format for a temporal axis based on data range.

exports.name: buildAggregateQuery
exports.description: Builds a SQL aggregate query with optional error bar columns.

exports.name: N6KPage
exports.description: Page layout wrapper that sets the document title via binding interpolation.

props.name: title
props.description: Document title string (supports binding interpolation).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the page container.

props.name: children
props.description: Page content.

exports.name: N6KTitle
exports.description: Heading component with binding interpolation for dynamic text.

props.name: children
props.description: Title text (supports binding interpolation).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the heading element.

exports.name: N6KSection
exports.description: Section layout with a title heading and vertical spacing.

props.name: title
props.description: Section heading text.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the section element.

props.name: children
props.description: Section content.

exports.name: N6KGrid
exports.description: CSS grid layout with a custom column template.

props.name: columns
props.description: CSS grid-template-columns value.

props.name: gap
props.description: Tailwind gap class applied to the grid.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the grid container.

props.name: children
props.description: Grid items.

exports.name: N6KColumns
exports.description: Equal-width column grid layout.

props.name: cols
props.description: Number of equal-width columns.

props.name: gap
props.description: Tailwind gap class applied to the grid.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the grid container.

props.name: children
props.description: Column items.

exports.name: N6KConditional
exports.description: Conditionally renders children when a binding value is truthy.

props.name: when
props.description: Binding key to evaluate.

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered when the binding is truthy.

exports.name: N6KPills
exports.description: Multi-select pill toggle bound to a reactive binding.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional label displayed before the pills.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of selectable option values.

props.name: bind
props.description: Binding key for the selected values array.

props.name: multi
props.description: Whether multiple pills can be active at once.

exports.name: N6KToggle
exports.description: Boolean toggle checkbox bound to a reactive binding.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed next to the checkbox.

props.name: bind
props.description: Binding key for the boolean value.

exports.name: DataTable
exports.description: Pure data table with virtualized rows and sortable columns.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column name strings.

props.name: rows
props.description: Array of row objects keyed by column name.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height of the scrollable area (number in px or CSS string).

props.name: showRowCount
props.description: Whether to display the total row count footer.

props.name: showRowIndex
props.description: Whether to prepend a row-index column.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the root container.

exports.name: N6KDataTable
exports.description: DuckDB-powered data table with interactive WHERE clause filtering.

props.name: table
props.description: DuckDB table name to query.

props.name: cols
props.description: Column names to select (defaults to all).

props.name: where
props.description: Initial WHERE clause filter expression.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height of the scrollable area (number in px or CSS string).

props.name: showRowCount
props.description: Whether to display the total row count footer.

props.name: showRowIndex
props.description: Whether to prepend a row-index column.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the root container.

exports.name: N6KQuery
exports.description: Interactive SQL query editor with a result table.

props.name: query
props.description: Initial SQL query string pre-filled in the editor.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the root container.

exports.name: N6KBarChart
exports.description: Bar chart with aggregation, error bars, dodge, and hue support.

props.name: table
props.description: DuckDB table name as the data source.

props.name: query
props.description: SQL query as the data source (mutually exclusive with table).

props.name: x
props.description: Field or expression mapped to the x-axis.

props.name: y
props.description: Field or expression mapped to the y-axis.

props.name: y2
props.description: Optional secondary y field for range bars.

props.name: hue
props.description: Field used for color grouping.

props.name: stack
props.description: Stack mode: true for stacked, "normalize" for 100% stacked.

props.name: aggregate
props.description: Vega-Lite aggregate transform applied to y.

props.name: xOffset
props.description: Field used for x-axis sub-grouping.

props.name: estimator
props.description: Statistical estimator for aggregate mode (mean, sum, count, median, min, max).

props.name: errorbar
props.description: Error bar type displayed in aggregate mode (ci, sd, se, pi).

props.name: orient
props.description: Bar orientation: "v" for vertical, "h" for horizontal.

props.name: dodge
props.description: Whether to dodge (side-by-side) grouped bars.

props.name: order
props.description: Custom sort order for x-axis categories.

props.name: hueOrder
props.description: Custom sort order for hue categories.

props.name: palette
props.description: Array of CSS color strings for the color scale.

props.name: color
props.description: Single CSS color applied when no hue is used.

props.name: xTitle
props.description: Custom x-axis title.

props.name: yTitle
props.description: Custom y-axis title.

props.name: legend
props.description: Legend position (left, right, top, bottom, etc.) or "none".

exports.name: VegaBarChart
exports.description: Bar chart powered by Vega-Lite with a Field-based API.

exports.name: N6KLineChart
exports.description: Line chart with hue grouping and temporal axis support.

props.name: table
props.description: DuckDB table name as the data source.

props.name: query
props.description: SQL query as the data source (mutually exclusive with table).

props.name: x
props.description: Field or expression mapped to the x-axis.

props.name: y
props.description: Field or expression mapped to the y-axis.

props.name: hue
props.description: Field used for color grouping (one line per value).

props.name: sort
props.description: Whether to sort x-axis values (defaults to true).

props.name: xTitle
props.description: Custom x-axis title.

props.name: yTitle
props.description: Custom y-axis title.

props.name: legend
props.description: Legend position or "none".

exports.name: N6KPieChart
exports.description: Pie/donut chart with SQL aggregation support.

props.name: table
props.description: DuckDB table name as the data source.

props.name: query
props.description: SQL query as the data source (mutually exclusive with table).

props.name: names
props.description: Field used for slice labels.

props.name: values
props.description: Field aggregated for slice sizes (omit for count).

props.name: aggregate
props.description: Aggregation function: "sum", "count", or "mean".

props.name: palette
props.description: Array of CSS color strings for the color scale.

props.name: innerRadius
props.description: Inner radius in pixels to create a donut chart.

props.name: legend
props.description: Legend position or "none".

exports.name: N6KScatterChart
exports.description: Scatter plot with optional hue and size encoding.

props.name: table
props.description: DuckDB table name as the data source.

props.name: query
props.description: SQL query as the data source (mutually exclusive with table).

props.name: x
props.description: Field or expression mapped to the x-axis.

props.name: y
props.description: Field or expression mapped to the y-axis.

props.name: hue
props.description: Field used for color grouping.

props.name: size
props.description: Field mapped to point size.

exports.name: N6KHistogram
exports.description: Histogram with configurable bins, statistical transforms, and hue grouping.

props.name: table
props.description: DuckDB table name as the data source.

props.name: query
props.description: SQL query as the data source (mutually exclusive with table).

props.name: x
props.description: Field or expression to bin along the x-axis.

props.name: stat
props.description: Statistic shown on the y-axis: "count", "frequency", "density", or "probability".

props.name: bins
props.description: Number of histogram bins.

props.name: binwidth
props.description: Fixed bin width (overrides bins).

props.name: binrange
props.description: Explicit [min, max] range for binning.

props.name: hue
props.description: Field used for color grouping.

props.name: multiple
props.description: How grouped histograms overlap: "layer", "dodge", or "stack".

exports.name: N6KVegaChart
exports.description: Raw Vega-Lite spec renderer with DuckDB data source.

props.name: table
props.description: DuckDB table name as the data source.

props.name: query
props.description: SQL query as the data source (mutually exclusive with table).

props.name: spec
props.description: Vega-Lite specification object (data is injected automatically).
